Chapter 7, cash on cash, the COC, while most investors talk about price, and cap rate. When buying, there's no figure more important to me than the cash on the cash. I didn't like that moment. I didn't like that time. Nobody did, but I didn't lose any properties. In the bank where I got my financing went under, but not me. Cash flow makes you bulletproof. Cash flow is the Holy Grail business. Cash flow is the simple, most simple way to manage any business. Imagine that. A bank, a hundred, multi-hundred million dollar bank went out of business. They lent me money, busted out in the apartment buildings that I owned, never missed a payment to the bank that busted out. Or maybe they just couldn't confront the fact that, hey man, look, bad times happened. And they all failed. And the market got tough. I lost nothing because I had the CF cash flow.
